name: Lanpec Technologies Limited
summary: Lanpec Technologies Limited manufactures and sells petroleum and petrochemical equipment in China and internationally. The company offers oil drilling machinery, including oil drilling machinery DC drive, DC drive cluster, and 1500-7000 meters series drilling rigs; and mud pumps and mud pump single pumps, mud pump wearing parts and petroleum cylinder roller chains, pumping units/rods/pump products, drill products, and screws drilling and other downhole tools. It also provides refining and chemical equipment, which include shell-and-shell heat exchangers, tube heat exchangers, heat exchanger separators, liquefied natural gas open-frame gasifiers, surface evaporation air coolers, hydrogenation heat exchangers, heat extraction furnaces, plate air cooling, plate evaporators, liquid hydrocarbon spherical storage tanks, cryogenic spherical tanks, egg-shaped sludge digestion tanks, and thermal power unit plate type air-condensing steam devices; synthesis towers, nitrogen storage tanks, and hydrocracking high-pressure heat exchangers; and liquefied petroleum gas cryogenic spherical tanks and liquid hydrocarbon spherical tanks. In addition, the company offers offshore oil equipment comprising oil and gas separation equipment, oil and gas water treatment systems, oily sewage treatment systems, and water injection systems; and engineering software design, as well as technical services. Further, it provides light and food machinery and equipment, such as plate heat exchangers, plate type sterilization units, plate and tube evaporators, and plate condensers. Lanpec Technologies Limited was founded in 1960 and is based in Lanzhou, China. As on March 13, 2020, Lanpec Technologies Limited operates as subsidiary of China Energy Engineering Group Co., Ltd.
